extra.reason: Added UPDATE statements in Up()/Down() to convert integer enum values to/from string names before AlterColumn
Changed GreaterThan(DateTime.UtcNow) to Must(date => date!.Value > DateTime.UtcNow) lambda for per-request evaluation
Replaced result.Data! with result.Data ?? throw new InvalidOperationException() for explicit null guard
Replaced sequential CountAsync+ToListAsync with Task.WhenAll to fire both DB queries concurrently
Extracted private static ValidationError() helper; replaced 3 duplicated BadRequest calls
Removed CreatedAt and IsDeleted from service-layer entity initializer; repository owns both
Removed Enum.IsDefined checks from service; FluentValidation at controller boundary is the single validation point. Removed 4 stale service tests.
